text: For the terminology, we really need to label our navigation links—particularly links representing the main navigation structure—with terms that are familiar to the user.

turn_text: For the terminology, we really need to label our navigation links—particularly links representing the main navigation structure—with terms that are familiar to the user. We should draw on their general knowledge, their prior experience in the application domain, or their experience of using other systems so they instantly know where to click. While we're designing those menus, we also have to ensure that navigation links are clearly distinguishable from controls activating some action. Also, please make sure the quality of textual content with respect to spelling and grammar is sufficient so as not to impede readability; bad typos just ruin the experience. Finally, the entire user interface needs to be suitable for users with special needs, so accessibility has to be a priority.
